auth.label: Secret API Key
auth.description: Canny secret API key sent as the apiKey POST parameter. Find it in your Canny company settings.

actions.name: create_comment
actions.description: Create a new Canny comment on a post or as a reply to a comment.

parentID.description: Parent comment ID when creating a reply.

internal.description: Whether the comment is internal only.

createdAt.description: Original creation time in ISO 8601 format.

imageURLs.description: Image URLs attached to the comment.

shouldNotifyVoters.description: Whether voters of the post should receive notifications.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action. Either value or imageURLs is required.

id.description: Unique identifier of the created comment.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: create_or_update_user
actions.description: Create a new Canny user or update an existing one by id, userID, or email.

created.description: ISO 8601 timestamp from the source system.
ISO 8601 timestamp when the company was created.

customFields.description: Custom fields associated with the record.
Custom fields associated with the record.

userID.description: External user ID from the source system.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action. At least one of id, userID, or email is required.

id.description: Unique identifier of the created or updated user.

user.description: Identifier of the created or updated user.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: create_post
actions.description: Create a new Canny post on a board for a specific author.

byID.description: Admin authoring the post on behalf of the user.

createdAt.description: Original creation time in ISO 8601 format.

eta.description: Estimated timeframe for delivery in MM/YYYY.

etaPublic.description: Whether the ETA should be visible to end users.

imageURLs.description: Image URLs attached to the post.

customFields.description: Custom fields associated with the record.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

id.description: Unique identifier of the created post.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: list_boards
actions.description: List all Canny boards available to the authenticated workspace.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

created.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the board was created.

postCount.description: Number of posts on the board.

privateComments.description: Whether comments are private by default.

token.description: Public token associated with the board.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: list_comments
actions.description: List Canny comments with optional filtering and pagination.

limit.description: Maximum number of items to return.

skip.description: Number of items to skip before returning results.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

created.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the comment was created.

likeCount.description: Number of likes on the comment.

anyOf.description: Parent comment ID when this is a reply.

imageURLs.description: Image URLs attached to the comment.

created.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the user was created.

isAdmin.description: Whether the user is a Canny admin.

userID.description: External user ID from the source system.

url.description: URL to the user in Canny admin.

created.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the company was created.

customFields.description: Custom fields associated with the record.
Custom fields associated with the record.

lastActivity.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the user's last activity.

postCount.description: Number of posts on the board.

actions.name: list_posts
actions.description: List Canny posts with optional filtering, search, sorting, and pagination.

search.description: Search query applied to post titles and bodies.

sort.description: Sort order used when fetching posts.

status.description: Comma-separated list of statuses to filter by.

tagIDs.description: Tag IDs used to filter posts.

limit.description: Maximum number of items to return.

skip.description: Number of items to skip before returning results.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

created.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the post was created.

commentCount.description: Number of comments on the post.

imageURLs.description: Image URLs attached to the post.

actions.name: update_post
actions.description: Update mutable fields on an existing Canny post.

etaPublic.description: Whether the ETA should be visible to end users.

imageURLs.description: Updated image URLs for the post.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action. At least one mutable field is required.
